zh.Solbjerg, Løve, Holbæk, Denmark: 丹麥霍爾ae可勒福索爾比格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Niels Jacobsen Rud於1300年出生在丹麥洛斯吉爾德時，他的父親Jakob Rud38歲，母親Mrs- Jakob Rud31歲。他於大約1329年與Yliama N. Nielsen結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1358年之後。

zh-hans.Solbjerg, Løve, Holbæk, Denmark: 丹麦霍爾ae可勒福索爾比格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Niels Jacobsen Rud于1300年出生在丹麦洛斯吉爾德时，他的父亲Jakob Rud38岁，母亲Mrs- Jakob Rud31岁。他于大约1329年与Yliama N. Nielsen结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1358年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Rud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hungarian (Rúd): from rúd ‘stick’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a soldier or a nickname for a fighter.
English: variant of   Rudd  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Ruud
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Knut, Nels, Nils, Alf, Egil, Lars, Ludvig, Ottar.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads called Ru(u)d, in eastern Norway particularly, from Old Norse ruth ‘clearing’. Compare Rud , Rood , and Roode .

nameMeanings.name: Niels
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

nameMeanings.name: Jacobsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Jorgen, Nils, Anders, Gudrun, Iver, Knud, Alf, Bjorn, Borge, Fredrik.
Danish, Norwegian, North German, and Dutch: patronymic from the personal name   Jacob  . Compare   Jacobson   and   Jakobsen  .

variants.name: Jacob
meanings: Biblical name, from Hebrew Yaakov. This was borne by perhaps the most important of all the patriarchs in the Book of Genesis. Jacob was the father of twelve sons, who gave their names to the twelve tribes of Israel. He was the son of Isaac and Rebecca and twin brother of Esau. According to the story in Genesis, he was the cunning younger twin, who persuaded his brother Esau to part with his right to his inheritance in exchange for a bowl of soup (‘a mess of pottage’). Later, he tricked his blind and dying father into blessing him in place of Esau. The derivation of the name has been much discussed. It is traditionally explained as being derived from Hebrew akev ‘heel’ and to have meant ‘heel grabber’, because when Jacob was born ‘his hand took hold of Esau's heel’ (Genesis 25:26). This is interpreted later in the Bible as ‘supplanter’ Esau himself remarks, ‘Is he not rightly named Jacob? for he has supplanted me these two times’ (Genesis 27:36). Jacob is especially common as a Jewish given name, although it also became very popular among the Puritans from the 16th century onwards, and has again been widely used since the 1990s. Compare James .

en.lifeSummary: When Niels Jacobsen Rud was born in 1300, in Roskilde, Denmark, his father, Jakob Rud, was 38 and his mother, Mrs- Jakob Rud, was 31. He married Yliama N. Nielsen about 1329. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1358.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Niels Jacobsen Rud est né en 1300, à Roskilde, Danemark, son père, Jakob Rud, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mrs- Jakob Rud, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Yliama N. Nielsen environ 1329. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1358.

de.lifeSummary: Als Niels Jacobsen Rud 1300 in Roskilde, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jakob Rud 38 und seine Mutter Mrs- Jakob Rud 31. Er hat um 1329 Yliama N. Nielsen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1358.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Niels Jacobsen Rud è nato il nel 1300 nel Roskilde, Danimarca, il suo padre, Jakob Rud, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Mrs- Jakob Rud, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Yliama N. Nielsen circa 1329. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1358.

ja.lifeSummary: Niels Jacobsen Rudが1300年にデンマークロスキルドで生まれた時，父Jakob Rudは38歳，母Mrs- Jakob Rudは31歳であった。約1329年にYliama N. Nielsenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1358年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Niels Jacobsen Rud(이)가 1300년 덴마크 로스킬드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jakob Rud(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs- Jakob Rud(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1329년 Yliama N. Nielsen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1358년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Niels Jacobsen Rud nasceu em 1300, em Roskilde, Dinamarca, seu pai, Jakob Rud, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mrs- Jakob Rud, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Yliama N. Nielsen aproximadamente 1329. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1358.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Niels Jacobsen Rud родился в 1300 г. в местности роскаилд, Дания, его отцу по имени Jakob Rud было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs- Jakob Rud, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Yliama N. Nielsen около 1329 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1358 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Niels Jacobsen Rud nació en 1300, en Roskilde, Dinamarca, su papá, Jakob Rud, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mrs- Jakob Rud, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Yliama N. Nielsen aproximadamente 1329. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1358.
